rules.name: BLA_Food_IndustrialCamps_PersonalServices_RecWater
rules.label: BLA-Food, Industrial Camps, Personal Services, Rec Water

Flow.description:
Clone from VisitCreation flow and update Screen elements to align with PHOCS requirements
V9 - Adding Insp types to Drinking Water V10- Removing the banner Msg for Non-Dairy in Insp path.

formulas.name: followUpInspectionTypeNameSelected
FollowUpInspTypeName

Flow.label: VisitCreationPHOCS

fields.name: InfoHighlights
fields.fieldText: Please check if all applicable equipment are added to the facility before saving the inspection record, so that pertinent questions are automatically added to the inspection.﻿
